data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Secure data transmission with encryption over HTTPS.

data.title: Multi-factor Authentication
data.description: Enhanced authentication with MFA for secure user account access.
data.technical_spec: Time-based one-time password (TOTP) apps or SMS.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security audits to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Vulnerability scanning tools and penetration testing.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention
data.description: Mechanisms to prevent unauthorized data exfiltration.
data.technical_spec: Data encryption at rest and DLP policies.

data.title: Infrastructure Hardening
data.description: Security measures to protect the site's infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Firewalls, intrusion detection systems, and OS hardening.
